flags.concern: tests/test_topic_editor_runtime.py:273 hardcodes `assert len(llm_call["tools"]) == 13`. Adding 3 new tools increases TOPIC_EDITOR_TOOLS to 16 items, so this assertion will fail. The plan must update the expected count to 16 (or remove the redundant hardcoded count since the preceding line already asserts `llm_call["tools"] == TOPIC_EDITOR_TOOLS`).
flags.evidence: tests/test_topic_editor_runtime.py:272-273; current TOPIC_EDITOR_TOOLS has 13 entries (4 existing read tools + 2 vision tools + 7 write tools). Adding 3 new read tools makes 16.
